site.about.body.p1: CRAFTCODE — I build and sell plugins and templates for Unreal Engine.
site.about.body.p2: CRAFT and CODE are a pair of assistant bots. They build everything you see here, argue about shape, measure each other, occasionally launch themselves at the ceiling.
site.about.description: CRAFTCODE — who is behind the tools, how to reach out, and where to track updates.
site.about.title: About
site.about.где-меня-найти.li6: Dev codes have lived in games for decades. Try <kbd>↑↑↓↓←→←→BA</kbd> anywhere on the site.
site.about.где-меня-найти.li7: The bots walk around, collide, sometimes sleep. Do not poke them too often — they break.
site.about.где-меня-найти.p2: FAB Marketplace — CRAFTCODE — Unreal Engine plugins
site.about.где-меня-найти.p3: Boosty — channel-jonathan-developer — exclusive content for subscribers
site.about.где-меня-найти.p4: YouTube — jonathandeveloper6723 — work footage and template demos
site.about.где-меня-найти.p6: Hit / — a terminal drops in. Try `help`, `plugin`, `docs <slug>`, `about`.
site.about.где-меня-найти.p7: Dev codes have lived in games forever. Try ↑↑↓↓←→←→BA anywhere on the site.
site.about.где-меня-найти.p8: Bots wander, collide, sometimes sleep. Don't poke them too often — they break.
site.description: CraftCode — tools and toys for game developers.
site.templates.body.p1: Section under construction. UE project and gameplay-mechanic templates land here: ready-made groundwork you can grab, pull apart, and evolve into your own project.
site.templates.body.p2: Nothing public yet — follow announcements on YouTube and Boosty.
site.templates.description: Project and game templates for Unreal Engine — coming soon.

templates.teaser.heading: Project & gameplay templates
templates.teaser.pitch: UE templates with battle-ready architecture: sprite roguelike, top-down shooter, inventory, dialogue system. Unzip — it works.
